app.name: Wealthpath
app.tagline: Project your cash flow, check your liquidity.

home.title: Plan your personal cash flow
home.subtitle: Simulate your future cash position based on how you allocate across French savings products — Livret A, LDDS, LEP, PEA, life insurance, retirement and more.
home.privacy: Your data never leaves your browser.

projection.title: Cash flow projection
projection.body: Compare two scenarios: no investment, and with your allocation.

liquidity.title: Liquidity tracking
liquidity.body: See your liquid, semi-liquid, and locked funds over the full horizon.

private.title: 100% private
private.body: No signup, no server. Your data stays in your browser.

inputs.title: Your data
inputs.subtitle: Enter your current financial situation. Everything saves automatically to your browser.

profile.title: Profile
profile.situation_help: Used to suggest an allocation suited to your profile.
profile.household_help: Affects life insurance allowances after 8 years.

balance.title: Current balance
balance.label: Cash available today
balance.help: Total in your checking account and immediately accessible savings.

incomes.title: Income
incomes.subtitle: Salary, freelance, scholarship, benefits — anything that comes in regularly.
incomes.empty: No income added. Click 'Add an income' to start.

recurring_expenses.title: Recurring expenses
recurring_expenses.subtitle: Rent, loans, subscriptions, groceries, utilities…
recurring_expenses.empty: No recurring expenses. Click to add one.

one_off_expenses.title: One-off expenses
one_off_expenses.subtitle: Renovations, vacations, wedding, car purchase, annual taxes…

horizon.title: Projection horizon
horizon.subtitle: How many years do you want to project ahead?

allocation.title: Allocation
allocation.subtitle: Distribute your savings and see the impact.

profile.label: Starting suggestion
profile.help: A starting point — drag the sliders to adjust.

custom.title: Custom product
custom.help: Set your own parameters. Return is treated as net of tax.
custom.empty_state: No custom product. Add one to model a product not in the list.

livret-a.name: Livret A
livret-a.info: French regulated savings account, fully tax-free. Instant access. Cap €22,950.

ldds.name: LDDS
ldds.info: Sustainable Development Savings Account. Same terms as Livret A, cap €12,000.

lep.name: LEP
lep.info: Popular Savings Account. Highest regulated rate, but income-restricted.

livret-jeune.name: Youth Savings
livret-jeune.info: Ages 12-25 only. Bank-set rate, at least the Livret A rate. Cap €1,600.

cel.name: CEL
cel.info: Home Savings Account. Linked to mortgage eligibility.

pel.name: PEL
pel.info: Home Savings Plan. Rate locked for the life of the plan, but any withdrawal closes it.

av-fonds-euros.name: Life insurance · euro fund
av-fonds-euros.info: Capital-guaranteed. Tax-advantaged after 8 years. Available in a few days.

av-uc.name: Life insurance · UC
av-uc.info: Units of account: ETFs, REITs, equity funds. No guarantee. Market-equivalent risk.

pea.name: PEA
pea.info: Stock Savings Plan. Cap €150,000. Locked for 5 years, then 0% income tax on gains.

per.name: PER
per.info: Retirement Savings Plan. Contributions deductible from taxable income. Locked until retirement.

cto.name: Brokerage account
cto.info: Standard brokerage account. No cap, no lock-in. PFU 31.4% on gains.

warnings.over_capacity: You have allocated more than your available capital.

simulation.title: Simulation
simulation.subtitle: See the projected impact of your allocation.
simulation.no_allocation: No products allocated yet. Go back and set up your allocation.

horizon.title: Simulation horizon
horizon.subtitle: How many years do you want to project ahead?

projection.title: Projection
projection.subtitle: Compound growth of your allocation vs. holding cash.
projection.disclaimer: Projection based on constant rates and annual compounding. Rates may change. This is not investment advice.

liquidity.title: Liquidity over time
liquidity.subtitle: How accessible will your money be at each point in the horizon?
liquidity.disclaimer: Liquidity is indicative. PEA becomes semi-liquid after 5 years from start date. PEL and PER remain locked for the full duration.

summary.title: Summary
summary.subtitle: Your full financial picture at a glance.

actions.reset_confirm: This will erase all your data.

footer.disclaimer: For informational purposes only. Does not constitute investment advice within the meaning of article L321-1 of the French Monetary and Financial Code.
